Interface ITopology

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geodatabase
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geodatabase.dll

Provides access to members that control a topology.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("C08348E2-5AC1-4D88-A2D0-B675317BB6CD")]
public interface ITopology

Properties

Cache

The topology graph of the topology.

ITopologyGraph Cache { get; }

Property Value

ITopologyGraph

The cluster tolerance of the topology.

double ClusterTolerance { get; }

double

The dirty area polygon of the topology.

Sample Snippet

FeatureDataset

The feature dataset that contains the topology.

IFeatureDataset

Sample Snippet

MaximumGeneratedErrorCount

The maximum number of errors to generate when validating a topology.

int MaximumGeneratedErrorCount { get; }

int

Sample Snippet

State

Indicates whether the topology is clean or not.

esriTopologyState State { get; }

esriTopologyState
